user_query: I want to assess the market status and the pair strength for the 'AUD/USD' and 'CAD/JPY' pairs on an hourly timeframe.

TaskList.description: Fetch the current market status for the 'AUD/USD' pair on an hourly timeframe.
Fetch the current market status for the 'CAD/JPY' pair on an hourly timeframe.
Analyze the performance data of the 'AUD/USD' pair.
Analyze the performance data of the 'CAD/JPY' pair.
Compare the strength of both currency pairs based on the analysis from previous subtasks.
